_comment: Loz's World - tweak any of these and refresh the browser. Edit with Notepad.

_help.sensitivity: Master mouse speed. 0.3 = slow/precise, 1.0 = fast. Try 0.4 to 0.8.
_help.sensitivityX: Per-axis horizontal multiplier. Keep 1.0 unless you want anisotropic.
_help.sensitivityY: Per-axis vertical multiplier. Drop to 0.7 if up/down feels too twitchy.
_help.invertY: true = pull mouse down to look up (flight-sim style).
_help.smoothing: 0 = no smoothing (instant). 0.5 = soft. 0.85 = very smooth but laggy.
_help.maxLookUpDeg: Stop your camera from flipping past straight up. 85 is normal.
